errors.networkError: Service unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.unexpected: Service unavailable. Please try again later.

setup.title: Welcome to Pulse
setup.subtitle: Create your admin account to get started

errors.statusCheck: Unable to check setup status. Is the server running?
errors.alreadyCompleted: Setup has already been completed. Redirecting to login...
errors.networkError: Service unavailable. Please try again later.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

empty.title: No monitors yet
empty.description: Create your first monitor to start tracking uptime.

heatmap.title: Uptime Heatmap (24h)
heatmap.ariaLabel: Uptime heatmap showing hourly system state over the last 24 hours

monitors.title: Monitors

notFound.title: Monitor not found
notFound.description: The monitor you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load monitors. Please try again.
errors.detailFailed: Failed to load monitor details. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete monitor. Please try again.
errors.editLoadFailed: Failed to load monitor. Please try again.

monitors.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

pause.title: Pause monitor?
pause.description: Pausing will stop all health checks for {name}. No data will be collected while paused.

resume.title: Resume monitor?
resume.description: Resuming will restart health checks for {name}. The next check will run shortly.

form.name: Name
form.retentionHelp: Number of days to keep check history data (1–365, default 30)
form.expectedStatusCodesHelp: Comma-separated HTTP status codes considered successful
form.skipTlsVerifyHelp: When enabled, the monitor will skip TLS certificate chain and hostname verification. Use with caution.
form.customHeadersHelp: Non-secret headers sent with each check request (up to 5). To monitor a server by IP, add a Host header with the domain name.
form.payloadHelp: Data to send to the UDP target
form.handshakeMessageHelp: Message to send after WebSocket connection is established
form.secretReferenceHelp: Optional secret to attach to this monitor

targetHelp.http: URL or domain name (defaults to https://)
targetHelp.websocket: URL with ws:// or wss:// scheme, or just hostname (defaults to wss://)
targetHelp.smtp: Mail server hostname or host:port (e.g., mail.example.com)

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Key-value tags for organizing and filtering monitors (max 20).
tags.keyError: Key must start with a lowercase letter and contain only a-z, 0-9, _ or - (max 64 chars)
tags.valueError: Value must be 256 characters or fewer

proto.reflectionHint: Set a target address to enable reflection
proto.saveFirst: Save the monitor first to configure proto source and request payload.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and API access.

tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.description: API tokens provide programmatic access to the Pulse API. Use them for CI/CD pipelines, automation scripts, and external integrations.
tokens.existingDescription: Token values are never displayed after creation. Only metadata is shown.

errors.networkList: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your network connection.
errors.unexpectedList: An unexpected error occurred while loading tokens.
errors.networkCreate: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again.
errors.unexpectedCreate: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Configure credentials for this monitor's health-check requests.
auth.createDescription: Optional credentials for this monitor's health-check requests.
auth.pendingCredential: {authType} credential will be created with the monitor.
auth.replacingNotice: Replacing credential — fill in the new values below.

credentials.empty: No credentials configured for this monitor.

modal.secretWarning: This secret will not be shown again. Make sure to copy it before closing.

grpc.sslExpiryThresholdHelp: Alert when certificate expires within this many days
grpc.metadataHelp: Custom gRPC metadata headers sent with each request
grpc.expectedStatusesHelp: gRPC status codes considered a healthy response

upload.dropzoneLabel: Drop proto files here or click to browse
upload.reflectionHint: Enter a target address to enable Server Reflection

payloadEditor.label: Request Payload (JSON)
payloadEditor.jsonHint: Write your gRPC request body as JSON. Use Format button for pretty-printing.

dns.expectedValueHelp: If set, check passes only when this value is found among DNS results
dns.dnsServerHelp: Custom DNS resolver (leave empty for default)

icmp.packetCountHelp: Number of ICMP echo requests to send (1-10)
icmp.lossThresholdHelp: Percentage of packet loss that triggers a 'down' state
icmp.useIpv6Help: Send ICMPv6 echo requests instead of IPv4

smtp.starttlsHelp: Attempt STARTTLS upgrade after EHLO (ignored when Implicit TLS is enabled)
smtp.implicitTlsHelp: Connect with TLS from the start (port 465). Use this instead of STARTTLS for SMTPS servers.
smtp.ehloDomainHelp: Domain name used in the EHLO greeting
smtp.sslExpiryThresholdHelp: Alert when certificate expires within this many days (0 = disabled)

validation.bothRequired: Please select both start and end times
validation.startBeforeEnd: Start time must be before end time

timeRange.retentionNotice: Selected range exceeds the {days}-day retention period. Data may be incomplete.
timeRange.truncatedNotice: Data has been truncated to the monitor's retention period ({days} days).

history.empty: No data available for the selected period.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Manage notification channels and alert delivery.

empty.title: No notification channels
empty.description: Create your first channel to start receiving alerts.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Channel
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All bindings using this channel will also be removed. This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Channel Name
form.namePlaceholder: e.g. Ops Team Email, Slack Webhook

email.recipientsHelp: Add up to 50 recipient email addresses.

webhook.urlHelp: HTTP or HTTPS endpoint to receive notifications (max 2048 characters).
webhook.methodHelp: HTTP method used for the webhook request.
webhook.headersHelp: Optional headers sent with each webhook request (up to 20).
webhook.bodyTemplateHelp: Go template for the webhook request body. Use template variables below.

triggers.title: Trigger Conditions
triggers.description: Select which events should fire notifications for this binding.
triggers.monitorDownHelp: Notify when the monitor transitions to a down state.
triggers.monitorUpHelp: Notify when the monitor recovers from a down state.
triggers.degradedHelp: Notify when response time exceeds the threshold.
triggers.sslExpiringHelp: Notify when SSL certificate is expiring within the specified days.
triggers.nFailuresInRowHelp: Notify when the monitor fails N times in a row.
triggers.noneSelected: At least one trigger condition must be selected.

reminders.title: Reminder Policy
reminders.description: Repeat notifications while the condition persists.

bindings.title: Notification Bindings
bindings.description: Configure which channels and triggers apply to this monitor.

empty.title: No notification bindings
empty.description: Add a binding to receive alerts for this monitor.

noChannels.title: No channels available
noChannels.description: Create a notification channel first from the Notifications page.

deleteConfirm.title: Remove Binding
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to remove this notification binding? You will no longer receive alerts from this channel for this monitor.

templateVariables.title: Template Variables
templateVariables.description: Available variables for use in webhook body templates.

smtpSettings.title: SMTP Settings
smtpSettings.description: Configure the SMTP server used for email notifications.
smtpSettings.tlsEnabledHelp: Use TLS encryption for the SMTP connection.
smtpSettings.deleted: SMTP settings removed. Email notifications are now disabled.
smtpSettings.notConfigured: SMTP is not configured. Email notifications are disabled.

deleteConfirm.title: Remove SMTP Settings
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to remove SMTP settings? Email notifications will be disabled.

validation.nameTooLong: Channel name must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.recipientsRequired: At least one recipient email is required.
validation.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://.
validation.urlTooLong: URL must be 2048 characters or fewer.
validation.methodInvalid: Method must be one of: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
validation.bodyTemplateRequired: Body template is required for webhook channels.
validation.headerNameTooLong: Header name must be 128 characters or fewer.
validation.headerValueTooLong: Header value must be 8192 characters or fewer.
validation.degradedThresholdRange: Threshold must be between 1 and 60000 ms.
validation.triggerRequired: At least one trigger condition is required.

errors.network: Service unavailable. Please try again later.
